pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the Quote Service, its business purpose, high-level architecture, and key capabilities including quote management, event-driven integration, and cloud-native deployment

page_notes.content: Add emojies and icons to improve the description

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Guide developers through initial setup, prerequisites, building the project, and running the application locally

pages.title: Build Configuration
pages.purpose: Detail the Gradle build system, dependencies, plugins, and how the project is structured and compiled

pages.title: Architecture
pages.purpose: Provide comprehensive overview of the system architecture, including layers, components, and design patterns used throughout the Quote Service

pages.title: API Design
pages.purpose: Document the REST API contract, endpoints, request/response formats, authentication, idempotency, and error handling patterns

pages.title: Data Layer
pages.purpose: Explain database schema, optimized queries, indexing strategy, and data access patterns for the Quote domain

pages.title: Event-Driven Integration
pages.purpose: Detail the event-driven architecture, Azure Service Bus integration, MuleSoft flows, idempotency patterns, and downstream system integration

pages.title: Security Model
pages.purpose: Describe OAuth2 authentication, JWT validation, authorization scopes, and security configuration throughout the application

pages.title: Resilience and Observability
pages.purpose: Explain circuit breakers, retry patterns, health checks, metrics collection, distributed tracing, and monitoring capabilities

pages.title: Deployment
pages.purpose: Overview of deployment strategies, environments, and the path from code to production

pages.title: Containerization
pages.purpose: Explain the Docker multi-stage build, container image structure, JVM configuration, and security practices

pages.title: Kubernetes Configuration
pages.purpose: Detail Kubernetes manifests for deployment, service exposure, and horizontal pod autoscaling configuration

pages.title: CI/CD Pipeline
pages.purpose: Document the Azure Pipelines configuration, build stages, testing gates, Docker image creation, and deployment automation

pages.title: Testing Strategy
pages.purpose: Describe the multi-layered testing approach including unit tests, integration tests, and performance testing with k6

pages.title: Performance Testing
pages.purpose: Detail k6 load testing scripts, test scenarios, performance thresholds, and how to execute and interpret results

pages.title: Operations Guide
pages.purpose: Provide operational runbook including deployment procedures, monitoring, troubleshooting, and maintenance tasks

pages.title: Development Workflow
pages.purpose: Explain the development process, AI usage in development, Git workflow, code quality standards, and contribution guidelines
